CustomField.description: for INC0381394 1 of 4 new fields, this one for redirecting to Eloqua Login, hence field name indicating that. 2023.10.05 MG: removed default value, as Eloqua now passing expectd value into field.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This field will redirect/require Eloqua Login
CustomField.label: Profiler Link (requires Eloqua Login)
